overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The clip begins with third-person walking through a commercial district with holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets, then transitions to high-speed first-person vehicle driving on elevated highways through dense skyscraper canyons.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: passing large cylindrical building covered in rotating holographic advertisement screens
approaching intersection crosswalk with red traffic light and waiting pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk, navigating past neon signs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and beige pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in multiple layers of holographic advertisement screens displaying various products
large vertical illuminated billboard with 'TOUGH MOST' text and graphics
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights and holographic displays
low metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a character walking through a dense cyberpunk commercial district at night. The cylindrical advertising tower dominates the left side with rotating holographic displays, while neon signs and billboards illuminate the wet reflective sidewalk. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction as the camera approaches an intersection crosswalk.

events.description: perspective switches from third-person walking to first-person vehicle driving on wet asphalt
vehicle accelerates and merges onto elevated highway ramp
flying vehicle passes overhead between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on wet highways, navigating gentle curves through the neon-lit skyscraper canyon

notable_agents.action: car with glowing red taillights driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: multi-lane raised roadway with red reflective safety barriers and wet asphalt surface
pink illuminated hotel sign on building facade visible from the highway
futuristic skybridge connecting two massive high-rise towers in the distance
tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building side

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to first-person vehicle driving, accelerating onto an elevated highway that cuts through the city's towering skyscrapers. The wet asphalt reflects streaks of neon light from surrounding buildings and digital billboards. The vehicle navigates gentle curves while passing under a futuristic skybridge, with other cars visible ahead and a flying vehicle crossing overhead between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a slow pedestrian stroll through a neon-lit commercial district to a high-speed drive along an elevated urban highway. It begins in a third-person view following a character past a massive cylindrical advertising tower and rotating holographic displays that cast vibrant light onto wet, reflective sidewalks. As the camera approaches a busy intersection crosswalk, the perspective shifts dramatically into a first-person vehicle view that accelerates away from the street level. The scene then opens up into a canyon of towering skyscrapers, with the vehicle navigating gentle curves on wet asphalt that mirrors the streaks of digital billboards. Finally, the movement surges forward under a futuristic skybridge, passing other cars and a flying vehicle crossing overhead between the monolithic buildings.
